text:
The tale of Tommy and his magical marbles.

In the small, sleepy town of Willow Creek, nestled between rolling hills and a quiet river, lived a young boy named Tommy. Tommy was known far and wide for his marbles, a collection so vast it was rumored to dwarf the prized stones of kings and queens from ages past. However, Tommy never actually won his marbles through competition; instead, they were gifts from various friendly sprites and goblins who roamed the woods and meadows around.

One crisp autumn morning, while exploring the deep, bramble-clad thicket behind his house, Tommy stumbled upon something truly unexpected—an ancient oak tree whose trunk bore a single, massive marble at its core. The stone glistened with an ancient magic untouched by time or man. Excited and a little frightened, Tommy scooped up the remarkable marble and ran straight home.
